title: Delta Ct HCC peritumours and tumours
author: Bonelli, Patrizia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset file contains delta CT data relating to the validation of expression of 90 genes in 59 matched HCV-related HCC and peri-tumor tissues using a custom multiplex array qPCR.  The ΔΔCt method was used   to calculate gene expression.
steps_raw: The dataset file contains delta CT data relating to the validation of expression of 90 genes in 59 matched HCV-related HCC and peri-tumor tissues using a custom multiplex array qPCR.  The ΔΔCt method was used   to calculate gene expression.
